name: game
description: Core minigame commands for inventory, shop, stats, boxes, and achievements.
details: Use `/game inventory` to inspect your loadout, `/game shop` to browse the current stock, and `/game stats` or `/game leaderboard` to track progress.

name: claim
details: Use this on an unclaimed wellspring. Some wellsprings are guarded and require defeating a guardian before ownership transfers.

name: challenge
description: Challenge the current holder of a wellspring.
details: Challenge a claimed wellspring to take control. Wins grant spores, losses still grant a small consolation reward, and challenge cooldowns apply.

name: wellsprings
details: Shows active locations, ownership state, rarity, expiry, and the next action to take at each wellspring.

name: daily
details: Claim a flat daily spore payout once per day to keep your economy moving even when you are not fighting.

name: arena
description: Arena PvP queue, profile, and leaderboard commands.
details: Join ranked or practice Arena queues, inspect your queue state, and view Arena profiles or the ladder.
